name: scikit-learn
tagline: Reference guide for scikit-learn ML workflows: classification, clustering, preprocessing, pipelines, tuning, and evaluation, with example.
verdict: Well-structured, accurate scikit-learn reference with clear trigger phrasing, concrete runnable code, stated defaults, and bulk content properly split into reference files. No security, supply-chain, or scope concerns found. Main gap: no 'NOT for' exclusions, so a dispatcher could misfire it on adjacent ML-library tasks it doesn't actually cover.

highlights.summary: No 'NOT for'/exclusion guidance anywhere in description or body to prevent misfiring on adjacent ML tasks.
